title: ribes multiflorum subsp. multiflorum
intro: Ribes multiflorum subsp. multiflorum, also known as the Alpine Currant, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating a range of health issues, including digestive problems, arthritis, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Alpine Currant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Alpine Currant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in folk remedies and traditional medicine.
